steps.title: Target intensity, not definition
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize the umami intensity of ma-konbu. The relevant note says study participants rated ma-konbu's umami intensity as high.

steps.title: Eliminate off-target facts
steps.content:
• Choice A defines umami but does not discuss ma-konbu's intensity.
  • Choice B focuses on where samples were collected.
  • Choice C identifies ma-konbu as a source of umami but does not state the intensity.

steps.title: Report the high rating
steps.content: The remaining choice says participants found ma-konbu's umami intensity to be high, which directly satisfies the goal. The answer is D.
